purpose: Record the focused Rage sub-bucket implementation pass following strict Combat bucket validation.

implementedFeats.name: Extra Rage
implementedFeats.mechanic: Normalizes to RAGE_USES_BONUS +1 and RageEngine retains a name fallback for existing actors/items.

implementedFeats.name: Dreadful Rage
implementedFeats.mechanic: Normalizes to RAGE_ATTACK_DAMAGE_BONUS_OVERRIDE 5 and RageEngine retains a name fallback for existing actors/items.

implementedFeats.name: Controlled Rage
implementedFeats.mechanic: Normalizes to RAGE_ACTION_MODE with canEndAtWill=true and RageEngine now has a name fallback for existing actors/items.

notes: This pass reuses the existing RageEngine instead of creating a parallel rage subsystem.
The normalizer writes passive RAGE_* rules onto actor-owned feat items when they are created or updated.
Existing actors without normalized rule metadata still benefit from RageEngine name fallbacks for Extra Rage, Dreadful Rage, and Controlled Rage.
